item.title: AlexSmithEcho: Alexander Smith @AlexSmithEcho · 2min On team news for Newcastle, Lewis Cook has started partial training with the group
item.description:
Alexander Smith @AlexSmithEcho · 2min On team news for Newcastle, Lewis Cook has started partial training with the group, and aside from him and Justin Kluivert, they have a fully-fit squad.
#afcb 2 35

item.title: AlexSmithEcho: Alexander Smith @AlexSmithEcho · 3min "I'm 100% certain that this club is in very good hands," Iraola says about the hie
item.description:
Alexander Smith @AlexSmithEcho · 3min "I'm 100% certain that this club is in very good hands," Iraola says about the hierarchy. He says he is certain they will hire a top manager to replace him.
#afcb 3 4 55

item.title: AlexSmithEcho: Alexander Smith @AlexSmithEcho · 4min Iraola says the decision he made was not about any other club. He does not know wh
item.description:
Alexander Smith @AlexSmithEcho · 4min Iraola says the decision he made was not about any other club. He does not know what he will be doing next season - he doesn't have any rush to decide, he says, and he is fully focused on the next six "massive" games.
#afcb 1 75

item.title: City_Xtra: City Xtra @City_Xtra · 5min Antoine Semenyo on @BernardoCSilva : "He gets bullied a lot in the changing room, I don't k
item.description:
City Xtra @City_Xtra · 5min Antoine Semenyo on @BernardoCSilva : "He gets bullied a lot in the changing room, I don't know why... A lot of the boys do it. (Why?) What he wears to training. It's not even bad, it's just very casual.
"I'm walking into the canteen, and I can see him in the corridor getting put Mostrar más All Out Football 7 14 225 3 mil

item.title: AlexSmithEcho: Alexander Smith @AlexSmithEcho · 7min Iraola says he would rather have made the mistake of he could have been here for a
item.description:
Alexander Smith @AlexSmithEcho · 7min Iraola says he would rather have made the mistake of he could have been here for another season, rather than the mistake of he stayed for a season too long. He says the club is in a great place and it hasn't been a clear decision.
#afcb 2 114

item.title:
lauriewhitwell: Laurie Whitwell @lauriewhitwell · 9min Do Manchester United need a super coach?
A look at the latest on club’s big dec
item.description:
Laurie Whitwell @lauriewhitwell · 9min Do Manchester United need a super coach?
A look at the latest on club’s big decision, which will come end of season, featuring Carrick, Nagelsmann, Enrique, Emery, Iraola.
Plus thoughts from McClaren, Fortune, Smalling.
Also, Ratcliffe #MUFC De nytimes.com 22 10 96 3 mil

item.title: LFC: Liverpool FC @LFC · 9min Join us live from the AXA Training Centre as Arne Slot previews Sunday’s Merseyside derby #EVE
item.description: Liverpool FC @LFC · 9min Join us live from the AXA Training Centre as Arne Slot previews Sunday’s Merseyside derby #EVELIV EN DIRECTO 3.234 visualizaciones Liverpool FC @LFC Live: Arne Slot press conference 50 9 117 7 mil
